title: DurabilityHUD
description: Durability HUD adds a clean and simple on-screen display that shows the durability of your currently held item and equipped armor in real time.
body:
Durability HUD adds a clean and simple on-screen display that shows the durability of your currently held item and equipped armor in real time.

No more opening your inventory to check durability — everything is visible directly on your HUD.

✨ Features:
Displays main hand item durability in %

Shows armor durability (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)

Color indicators:

🟢 Green — Good condition

🟡 Yellow — Medium durability

🔴 Red — Low durability

Toggle HUD position (Left / Right / Hidden)

Press X to switch modes
